<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Caster; use Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Cloner\Stub; /** * Represents any arbitrary value. * * @author Alexandre Daubois <alex.daubois@gmail.com> */ class ScalarStub extends Stub { public function __construct(mixed $value) { $this->value = $value; } }
